name: RETROPERITONEAL LYMPHANGIOMA
definition: exceedingly rare tumor usually discovered incidentally RENAL LYMPHANGIECTASIA / LYMPHANGIOMATOSIS exacerbation during pregnancy

demographics.Age: any; peaks during 3rd-6th decade of life
demographics.Frequency: rare benign renal tumor (50 cases in literature)
demographics.Histo: multiple communicating cysts lined by flattened endothelial cells; multiple septa

dominant_finding: thin-walled multilocular cystic lesion near fluid attenuation
discriminating_features: thin-walled multilocular cystic lesion near fluid attenuation
decreased SI on T1WI + increased intensity on T2WI
hypointense on T1WI + uniformly hyperintense on T2WI

CT: thin-walled multilocular cystic lesion near fluid attenuation
MR: decreased SI on T1WI + increased intensity on T2WI
hypointense on T1WI + uniformly hyperintense on T2WI
variable SI of intracystic fluid (depending on presence of hemorrhage / debris / protein
